title: HP Display
description: Display the health and the name of mobs.
body:
# Introduce

Display the health and the name of mobs.
The current version of this mod is only 1.20.4. Of course, if the official update is too fast for better mods to migrate to a higher version, I will also make it more compatible.

# Image

| ![A villager and many pigs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Cd6QQtGM/images/67bc5d4d39222a4fee5340725d8bdade84de6192.png) | ![Player was attacked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Cd6QQtGM/images/ea6e98d827017df16254260065e03c8f6dcbab0e.png) |
| ------------- | ------------- |
| ![The sweeping attack of the sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Cd6QQtGM/images/5913399a189c5af2d26e021b562e8d98c61dd4f0.png) | ![Was knocked away by an iron golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Cd6QQtGM/images/2fea8aec7492906ee2fd5d037e8e7a3b3c003c88.png) |

# Message

This mod was only created because the higher Minecraft version currently did not have a better health point display for the mod. So, it is just kidding.

# Feedback

If you find any bugs (I believe such a small mod won't have any), you can provide feedback to this email: zieys233@163.com
